asi.insight: 5 issues, each verifiable by code marker via grep. Metric issues_fixed = sum of marker matches.

description: Issue 4: Move multi-select from Ctrl+Click to Alt+Click in git_panel row handler

asi.insight: Shadowing gestures is a common trap when adding new handlers - grep for existing modifier uses first

description: Issues 1-3: DiffBase enum, dedup open tab, preview state, scratch buffer for staged

asi.bottleneck: open_diff_since(None) was not HEAD; 'Working ↔ HEAD' label lied
asi.approach: DiffBase enum + dedicated open paths; scratch buffer for IndexVsHead
asi.insight: Side-by-side diff needs actual base+buffer separation; can't just filter hunks. Pattern copied from commit_view::build_buffer_diff: BufferDiff::new + update_diff + set_snapshot.

description: Issue 5: GitFileDiffViewToolbar, drop custom header, file-history nav arrows in CommitViewToolbar

asi.bottleneck: custom header div blocked toolbar integration; no file history nav in CommitView
asi.approach: new GitFileDiffViewToolbar + extend CommitViewToolbar with file_filter-conditional arrows
asi.insight: ToolbarItemView wants `use workspace::ItemHandle` (trait, not alias). CommitView needs to store file_filter + workspace to enable navigation from its toolbar.

description: GUI verification via xdotool found + fixed 2 preview-tab bugs

asi.bottleneck: add_item-then-replace_preview_item_id left active_item_index dangling; BufferRangesUpdated un-previewed the tab
asi.approach: close_current_preview_item first then add at its slot; override preserve_preview=true on GitFileDiffView; drop redundant replace_preview in dedup branch
asi.insight: xdotool --window doesn't deliver X events to gpui's input loop — use global screen coords. window-manager intercepts alt-drag so alt+click can't be simulated via xdotool on this system.
